description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a rugged, open-frame design with a blue body accented by large yellow star decals on the hood and sides. The vehicle is equipped with four oversized, mud-stained tires with aggressive tread patterns, ideal for off-road conditions. Its exposed suspension system and reinforced chassis suggest durability and high performance on rough terrain. The cockpit is partially enclosed with mesh netting and a visible roll cage for occupant safety. The front end is fitted with protective bars and dual shock absorbers, while the rear reveals a detailed engine compartment and additional mesh protection. The overall build emphasizes functionality, safety, and off-road capability, making it suitable for urban adventure or utility use.
description: A blue, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with large mud-stained tires, yellow star decals, and a visible roll cage. It features rugged suspension, mesh netting, and protective bars for off-road performance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide stance, large tires, protective bars, and dual shock absorbers, with the yellow star decal on the hood clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mesh netting, side star decal, and the open cockpit, as well as the detailed suspension and mud-stained tires.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the exposed engine compartment, mesh protection, and the rear suspension system, with the vehicle's width and tire tread visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the star decal, mesh netting, and rugged tire design, with the roll cage and cockpit details apparent.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose or muddy terrain, making them suitable for all-terrain use.
